title: Extra Origin Keybinds
description: Adds 8 new keybinds for Origin creators to utilize
body:
Are you an Origin creator? Have you had so many cool ideas but not enough keybind to have them all? Well now you can!

This mod adds 8 new keybinds for you to use in your creations!

- `key.origins_extra_keybinds.tertiary` [Tertiary] 3rd ability
- `key.origins_extra_keybinds.quaternary` [Quaternary] 4th ability
- `key.origins_extra_keybinds.quinary` [Quinary] 5th ability
- `key.origins_extra_keybinds.senary` [Senary] 6th ability
- `key.origins_extra_keybinds.septenary` [Septenary] 7th ability
- `key.origins_extra_keybinds.octonary` [Octonary] 8th ability
- `key.origins_extra_keybinds.nonary` [Nonary] 9th ability
- `key.origins_extra_keybinds.denary` [Denary] 10th ability
